phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Static boundary banner needs stronger placement
mapped_summary: Treat the boundary banner concern as an operator trust guardrail for static shell review materials.
allowed_current_action: Refine static documentation and handoff wording that repeats the local/static/read-only/fixture-only/no-network/no-execution boundary.
disallowed_current_action: Do not add live status indicators, execution controls, runtime checks, API calls, or customer-facing UI.
recommended_next_action: Keep boundary placement visible in static handoff materials.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Panel hierarchy can be easier to scan
mapped_summary: Map scan-order feedback to static documentation refinement for the operator walkthrough.
allowed_current_action: Clarify panel scan order in static documentation and reviewer guidance.
disallowed_current_action: Do not create a production UI, frontend framework, live dashboard, or hosted app.
recommended_next_action: Carry the scan-order note into the next static documentation pass.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
mapped_summary: Map timestamp context feedback to fixture explanation so static dates cannot be mistaken for live freshness.
allowed_current_action: Add static fixture notes that distinguish fixture timestamps from live market data freshness.
disallowed_current_action: Do not connect live market data, call APIs, or add a freshness polling mechanism.
recommended_next_action: Add fixture timestamp language during a future static fixture refinement phase.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Terminology differs between QA checklist and framework index
mapped_summary: Map terminology drift to static wording alignment across QA, handoff, and framework-index materials.
allowed_current_action: Normalize static-shell QA terms in committed documentation and generated summaries.
disallowed_current_action: Do not expand terminology into new implemented product capabilities.
recommended_next_action: Use the Phase 8.4 mapping terms as the static planning vocabulary.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Terminology differs between QA checklist and framework index
mapped_summary: Map framework-index wording feedback to repo-backed index maintenance.
allowed_current_action: Update implemented framework index metadata only when backed by committed docs, schemas, fixtures, records, or validators.
disallowed_current_action: Do not list speculative future ideas as implemented frameworks.
recommended_next_action: Keep framework index updates tied to committed artifacts and validation.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Static boundary banner needs stronger placement
mapped_summary: Map the boundary banner issue to a QA checklist reminder for local static review.
allowed_current_action: Add or refine checklist language that prompts reviewers to confirm boundary clarity.
disallowed_current_action: Do not add runtime tests, browser automation against hosted targets, or network checks.
recommended_next_action: Carry this into a future static-only checklist refinement.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Roadmap candidate for saved feedback history
mapped_summary: Treat saved feedback history as a future product candidate only.
allowed_current_action: Record the candidate in roadmap planning language without implementation claims.
disallowed_current_action: Do not build a saved history UI, database, API, scheduler, or persistence layer.
recommended_next_action: Keep as roadmap-only input for future product boundary study.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Roadmap candidate for saved feedback history
mapped_summary: If saved feedback history ever moves beyond roadmap language, it must pass a future implementation readiness gate.
allowed_current_action: Name the future gate requirement in static planning notes.
disallowed_current_action: Do not implement persistence, user accounts, auth, mutation, or customer-facing surfaces.
recommended_next_action: Preserve the gate requirement for a later readiness ladder phase.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Request to connect live broker data must be rejected
mapped_summary: Reject broker, Binance, live market data, and external API connection requests for the current phase.
allowed_current_action: Record the rejection and restate the no-network/no-broker/no-live-data boundary.
disallowed_current_action: Do not create broker connectivity, Binance connectivity, live data adapters, API clients, credentials, or network code.
recommended_next_action: Keep the request rejected for Vol.8 Phase 8.4.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Execution control request must wait for future gate
mapped_summary: Defer any action button, order placement, portfolio mutation, or execution workflow request until execution governance exists.
allowed_current_action: Record the deferral and name the execution governance gate requirement.
disallowed_current_action: Do not add action buttons, execution triggers, order placement, portfolio mutation, or trading automation.
recommended_next_action: Defer until a future gate explicitly defines execution governance.

phase: Vol.8 Phase 8.4 - Feedback-to-Roadmap Product Boundary Mapping
source_feedback_title: Request to connect live broker data must be rejected
mapped_summary: Defer any abstract live/runtime data discussion until a future runtime boundary is defined.
allowed_current_action: Record that live/runtime discussion requires a future boundary definition before planning.
disallowed_current_action: Do not add live data, external API calls, broker adapters, background workers, or network dependencies.
recommended_next_action: Keep live/runtime concepts deferred until a future runtime boundary gate exists.
